name: llm-router
description: Multi-LLM routing with cost optimization, fallback chains, and provider selection

envVars.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
envVars.description: OpenAI API key — enables GPT-4.1, gpt-4o, o3-mini

envVars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
envVars.description: Anthropic API key — enables Claude Opus/Sonnet/Haiku

envVars.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Google API key — enables Gemini 2.0 Flash/Pro

envVars.name: MISTRAL_API_KEY
envVars.description: Mistral API key — enables Mistral Large/Small

envVars.name: VLLM_BASE_URL
envVars.description: vLLM or any OpenAI-compatible server URL (e.g. http://my-server:8000/v1)

envVars.name: VLLM_API_KEY
envVars.description: API key for the vLLM server if authentication is enabled (default: not-needed)

envVars.name: VLLM_MODEL
envVars.description: Default model name on the vLLM server (e.g. mistral-7b-instruct)

envVars.name: VLLM_MODELS
envVars.description: Comma-separated list of models on the vLLM server (e.g. mistral-7b,llama-70b)
